item.title: Why is SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 23-Apr, SBI Life Insurance Company Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply by 3.04% to ₹1,827.45, continuing a three-day losing streak that has seen the share price drop by 7.74%. This decline contrasts with the company’s robust long-term performance and strong fundamentals, highlighting short-term market pressures and investor sentiment challenges. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Apr, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Ltd. witnessed a significant rise in its share price, closing at ₹2,337.20, up by ₹95.65 or 4.27%. This surge reflects the company’s robust financial results, consistent outperformance against benchmarks, and strong investor confidence. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Apr, Jubilant Ingrevia Ltd's stock price rose sharply by 5.18% to ₹735.50, reflecting robust investor confidence driven by strong institutional holdings, favourable valuation metrics, and consistent market outperformance despite some underlying operational challenges. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Marico Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Apr, Marico Ltd. witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹778.95 with an increase of ₹6.25 or 0.81%. This upward movement reflects the company’s sustained strong performance relative to the broader market and its sector peers. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is KM Sugar Mills Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Apr, KM Sugar Mills Ltd witnessed a notable rise in its share price, closing at ₹29.64 with a gain of ₹1.24 or 4.37%. This upward movement reflects sustained investor confidence and robust trading activity amid broader market conditions. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Why is Aayush Art and Bullion Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 23-Apr, Aayush Art and Bullion Ltd’s stock price rose by 0.72% to ₹1,160.95, continuing a sustained upward trend that has seen the share outperform both its sector and the broader market indices over multiple time frames. Time: 6 hours ago

item.title: Has Patanjali Foods Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Patanjali Foods Ltd has declared a dividend of 87%, amounting to ₹1.74 per share, with an ex-date of April 24, 2026. While recent total returns have been negative, the company has shown strong performance over the longer term, particularly in the 3 to 5-year periods. Time: Apr 23 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has HCL Technologies Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, HCL Technologies Ltd has declared a dividend of 1200% (₹12 per share) with an ex-date of April 24, 2026. While recent short-term returns have been negative, the company has shown positive total returns over longer periods, particularly in the 3 to 5-year spans. Time: Apr 23 2026 11:30 PM IST

item.title: Has 360 ONE WAM Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, 360 ONE WAM Ltd has declared a dividend of 600%, amounting to 6 per share, with an ex-date of April 27, 2026. The company has shown strong total returns over various periods, particularly in the long term. Time: Apr 23 2026 11:30 PM IST
